test.note: Test infrastructure not yet implemented - this is part of testing-infrastructure milestone, not performance-optimization

lint.note: Linting not configured in this project - no eslint/prettier setup

nonBlockingIssues.description: SettingsModal allows users to set scrollback up to 10000 lines, which contradicts the recommended 1000-5000 range. Consider adding a warning when users exceed 5000 lines or setting a hard max of 5000 to prevent accidental memory issues.

summary: All 4 implementation features for the performance-optimization milestone passed code review. Typecheck validation passed. Test and lint validators are not applicable as testing infrastructure is a separate milestone. All assertions (VAL-PERF-001 through VAL-PERF-004, VAL-FLOW-002, VAL-FLOW-003) are satisfied. One non-blocking suggestion identified for scrollback settings UI.
